_comment: Bundle-size budgets for @pellux/goodvibes-sdk runtime entry points.
actual_gzipped_bytes + 50) for the last accepted dist/ baseline.
That keeps tiny facade entries from failing over a handful of bytes while
retaining tight proportional budgets for larger entry points.
To update after a legitimate bundle-size change or a new entry is added:
1. Run `bun run bundle:check` to see the current actual sizes.
2. Set gzip_bytes to max(ceil(actual * 1.2), actual + 50) for each changed entry.
3. Keep this comment free of stale wave/date-specific rationale.
Entry keys must match the `exports` map keys in packages/sdk/package.json exactly.

..rationale: full SDK re-export entry — re-exports all sub-entries; measured 235 B gzip + 50 B floor
